issues_found: Source body is truncated; final section on how inflation expectations affect business decisions is incomplete, preventing full verification of the key finding about price/wage plans
human_review_reason: Record is mostly accurate and well-structured. Minor concern is the truncated source body, but the record appropriately notes this limitation. The key claims about inflation expectations (5.8%, 5.0%, 4.8%, 2.8% figures), the RCT methodology, and the main findings are all verifiable and correctly stated from the available source text.
